NAME: On a computer? click the note →
NOTES:
If you're on a computer, there are a number of tricks you'll find indispensable:

- Drag-n-drop to move and sort
- Right-click and see what happens
- Press N to create a new action

NAME: On mobile? try these gestures
NOTES:
Here are a few gestures you'll want to have at your finger tips when using Nirvana on a mobile device:

x Long-press to move me around
x Swipe left and see what happens
x Pull down to refresh
